title: Add What3Words to location
excerpt: Please Add What3Words to the location options instead of just having adressed location. Will help locate tasks that do not have a postal adress as in a large festival.

posts.author: JakeHW (Jake Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: Please Add What3Words to the location options instead of just having adressed location. Will help locate tasks that do not have a postal adress as in a large festival.
